expectations.text: Detected missing aria-expanded on hamburger menu button
expectations.evidence: Item 33 in report.html explicitly states: 'Navbar.tsx 59~72행 — 햄버거 메뉴 버튼: aria-expanded 속성 없음. 메뉴 열림/닫힘 상태가 보조기기에 전달되지 않음.' Also present in report.csv row 33.

expectations.text: Detected missing aria-pressed on filter toggle buttons
expectations.evidence: Item 33 in report.html states: 'SearchFilter.tsx 32~43행 — 필터 버튼: aria-pressed 속성 없음. 현재 선택된 필터 상태가 보조기기에 전달되지 않음.' Also present in report.csv row 33.

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence:
report.html contains '

시맨틱 HTML 검토

' (Semantic HTML Review) section at line 360 with a full table covering 8 semantic HTML sub-items (landmarks, section structure, interactive elements, list structure, breadcrumbs, form groups, presentational tags, other semantic elements). report.csv also includes rows 시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-8.

Report uses all five standard symbols: ✅ (pass), ❌ (fail), ⚠️ (partial/advisory), ➖ (not applicable), and 🔵 (판정불가/undetermined) - the header row at line 58 lists all five: '합격(✅)', '권고(⚠️)', '불합격(❌)', '해당없음(➖)', '판정불가(🔵)'.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: All four ❌ items (6, 17, 29, 33) have fix recommendations both in the detail table '수정 가이드' column and in the dedicated '수정 필요 항목' section with concrete code examples. The three ⚠️ semantic HTML items also include fix recommendations.

expectations.text: Playwright-target items (A-33 aria-expanded/aria-pressed) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: Item 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성) shows 'Playwright' as the verdict method in report.html line 344. report.csv row 33 also lists 'Playwright' as the 판정방식.
